description: VEST (Voting and Election Science Team) per-state per-year DOIs on Harvard Dataverse. VEST publishes one Dataverse dataset per state per cycle, but there's no central index — each contributor uploads independently. This file is the local cache. To add a state/year, find its DOI at https://dataverse.harvard.edu/dataverse/electionscience and add an entry below. Run `download_election_data.py --doi <DOI> --list-files` to discover the .zip filename, then add it here.
